name: swarph-shared
summary: Shared substrate primitives for swarph-mesh ecosystem (caller convention, subprocess env scrubbing, JSON-mode harness, peer-name registry, cell.yaml schema). v0.3.0 adds the cell module per substrate-doc R7 §11.1.5 (O5) cell.yaml universal-genome relocation — pure dict→Cell parser; file I/O is swarph-cli's concern.
author: Pierre Samson, Claude Opus
